extraction.one_line_summary: DE GENDT Thomas attacked at kilometer zero, held 200km solo breakaway for stage win while ALAPHILIPPE Julian took yellow by sprinting for time bonuses on final climb.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE sprinted for 5-second bonus on final climb descent despite chasing breakaway, showing bonification hunting beats pacing.
PINOT Thibaut cooperated with ALAPHILIPPE in final kilometers to isolate GC rivals, sacrificing sprint finish for tactical alliance.
Trek allowed DE MARCHI Alessandro into early break to prevent CCC team from chasing hard, using teammate presence as control.
NIBALI Vincenzo dropped on final climb slopes signals vulnerability on moderately difficult terrain, not just high mountains.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: 200km solo breakaway victory demonstrates extreme endurance capacity that changes risk assessment for long-range attacks
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: sprinted hard for bonifications while already fatigued from chasing, showing willingness to suffer for marginal time gains
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: tactically astute cooperation with ALAPHILIPPE in finale, prioritized isolating GC rivals over personal sprint result
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped on final climb indicates poor form, concerning signal when struggling on sub-HC categorized terrain
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: protected yellow jersey but unable to follow ALAPHILIPPE's bonification attack on descent
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: neutral: early break inclusion served as team tactical placeholder rather than personal opportunity
